Off Calendar Jun-20-2022 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

HEARING RE: DEFENDANTS' PAYYOURPEOPLE, LLC and YOURPEOPLE, INC'S. Motion To Compel Arbitration And Dismiss The Complaint, Or In The Alternative, An Order To Stay Proceedings Pending Arbitration.

No appearances are made in this matter. The Court adopts its tentative ruling.

Defendant's motion to compel arbitration and stay is granted. (See Word minutes for complete ruling.)

Order signed.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer Jr.; Clerk: Sean Kane; Not Reported (302/RBU)
